shows.title: ET Encounters / Hypnotherapy & Bigfoot
shows.first_half: In the first half, guest host Connie Willis (info) speaks with alien abductee Bret Oldham about his encounters, thoughts, and theories on extraterrestrials. In the second half, board-certified hypnotherapist Doug Meacham will share his most successful sessions, detailing one of his more famous cases: Bob Gimlin's regression in relation to the Patterson-Gimlin film.
shows.second_half: From 6-10pm PT, Art Bell: Somewhere In Time returns to 2/19/01, when UFO expert Don Ecker talked about bizarre lunar images.

shows.title: Ancient Spirituality / Astrological Cycles
shows.first_half: First Half: Guest host Ryan Wrecker (email) welcomes investigative mythologist and author William Henry for a discussion about humanity's oldest spiritual traditions and their origins. Henry will explore how sacred art, ancient texts, and global mythologies suggest humans can transcend the limits of the physical world.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Astrologer Heather Ensworth, Ph.D., is a clinical psychologist who will talk about the current astrological age, the cycle we are experiencing, and how to understand the meaning of this intense time of turbulence and transformation on the planet.

shows.title: Secret Door XXV
shows.first_half: Who's behind the secret door? Join George Noory and four separate anonymous guests who will try to fool him as he tries to guess who they are throughout the show.

shows.title: Natural Remedies / Remote Viewing & Consciousness
shows.first_half: First Half: Dr. Drew Peterson will discuss the many ways we can use natural remedies to help with ailments and health issues in addition to using modern medicine. Dr. Drew believes that supplementation and natural remedies are essential when it comes to everyday health.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Remote viewer and instructor Michelle Freed will lay out her expertise in remote viewing, taking it far beyond its normal protocols and into its connection with consciousness. Freed will discuss many aspects, from tapping into past lives and energetic imprints to assisting in solving real-world crimes.

shows.title: Free Energy / Magic of the Mind
shows.guests: Judy D. Wood, Dr. Gustav Kuhn
shows.first_half: First Half: Former Professor of Mechanical Engineering Dr. Judy Wood will discuss the value of observation and how it can open up a world of free energy for all of us. She'll show that what happened to the WTC complex on September 11, 2001 provided evidence of free energy.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Cognitive Psychologist Dr. Gustav Kuhn will explore how magic can be used as a powerful tool for understanding the human mind. He'll draw from his experience as both a psychologist and magician and will discuss how magic reveals the limits of attention, perception, decision making, and belief.

shows.title: Alien Interactions / Mysteries of the Knights Templar
shows.guests: Neil deGrasse Tyson, Sarah Breskman Cosme
shows.first_half: First Half: Astrophysicist and author Neil deGrasse Tyson will discuss his new book, Take Me to Your Leader, which is a practical guide for dealing with alien visitors, an exploration of how it might happen, and a cultural history of our fascination with extraterrestrials.
shows.second_half: Second Half: Hypnotist and author Sarah Breskman Cosme will discuss the Knights Templar and the true nature of the treasure they were sworn to protect. She'll reveal why it may not be what history has led us to believe, and will explore hidden knowledge connected to ancient civilizations and sacred sites.

shows.title: Lake Worth Monster / Open Lines
shows.first_half: Guest host Richard Syrett will speak with author, musician, and cryptid researcher Lyle Blackburn about the case of the Lake Worth Monster, an alleged bipedal beast with white hair and horns said to have attacked a couple near Fort Worth, Texas on the night of July 10, 1969. Blackburn will explore this terrifying cryptid case and offer new insights, startling facts, and talk about never-before published interviews, photos, and maps. Followed by Open Lines in the latter half—give Richard a call and discuss whatever's on your mind!
